heading: Standby Reserve: status of members
label: 10153 Standby Reserve: status of members
text: While in an inactive status, a Reserve is not eligible for pay or promotion and (as provided in ) does not accrue credit for years of service under chapter 1223 of this title.section 12734(a) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 273(c) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(2)(A)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
